differential_diagnoses: Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS)
next_steps: Isolate the patient for airborne and contact precautions
Perform PCR testing of vesicle fluid for VZV and HSV
Perform punch biopsy for histopathology and immunohistochemistry
Perform HIV testing and CD4 count
Obtain skin scraping for microscopic identification of scabies mites

differential_diagnoses: Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS)
next_steps: Implement strict airborne and contact isolation precautions
PCR testing of vesicle fluid for VZV and HSV
Punch biopsy of skin lesion for histopathology and immunohistochemistry
Serologic testing for syphilis (RPR and treponemal antibody)
Skin scraping for microscopic examination for scabies mites
Dermatoscopy of the rash to evaluate for classic burrows
